title: Brand Promoter / Marketing Assistant
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements and other company and links
meta_description: La Chica Oy, Helsinki is seeking a Marketing assistant in Helsinki. We are looking for a visual and sales brand promoter, or marketing assistant, to help
description: We are looking for a visual and sales brand promoter, or marketing assistant, to help increase visibility and attract customers at La Chica beauty salons. This role involves creating engaging social media content, such as Reels, TikTok posts, and Instagram stories that align with the brand's aesthetic. You'll also write customer-oriented texts for newsletters and produce content that generates bookings and sales. With a strong visual eye and experience in social media content creation, you can make a significant impact on La Chica's growth and visibility within the beauty industry. Flexible cooperation as a freelancer or entrepreneur is available, along with opportunities to influence and develop the brand, long-term partnerships, and an inspiring and growing beauty brand.
what_we_expect: Strong visual eye (Instagram aesthetic in possession)
Experience with social media content (photography + editing)
An understanding of what sells and what works
Independent approach to work and initiative
Interest in the beauty industry
job_responsibilities: You film and produce content (Reels, TikTok, IG posts)
Ideas for campaigns and contents together with the team
You make publications that are visually in line with the La Chica brand
You write sales and customer-oriented texts for newsletters for customers
You produce content that actually brings bookings and customers
what_we_offer: Flexible cooperation as a freelancer / entrepreneur
The opportunity to influence and develop the brand
Long-term cooperation with the right person
An inspiring and growing beauty brand
search_keywords: brand promoter marketing assistant freelance entrepreneur beauty industry social media content visual aesthetic sales customer-oriented texts

title: Preventive Work Instructor
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Join SOS-Lapsikylä as a Supervisor of Preventive Work, supporting disadvantaged children and young people in Tampere with organizational skills to implement
description: We at SOS-Lapsikylä are dedicated to supporting disadvantaged children and young people, providing them with the support they need to reach their full potential. We're seeking a preventive work instructor for the Tampere area who can bring organizational skills and know-how to implement and develop our preventive work program. This role is part-time and fixed-term until December 31, 2026. The supervisor of preventive work works closely with the regional supervisor on implementing and developing SOS-Lapsikylä's preventive work activities in their area. They are responsible for planning and supervising local youth participation activities and representing SOS-Lapsikylä at events.
what_we_expect: AMK-level education in social, youth or educational fields suitable for the position
Experience working with people of different ages
Open-minded, innovative, holistic and self-directed
Good communication skills
Experience in child protection and/or youth work
Knowledge of support services for families with children
job_responsibilities: Develop and implement the 'Time for the child' activity for adult friends
Responsible for decisions and payments of hobby support and study support of the Dream come true program
Plan and supervise SOS-Lapsikylä's local SOS developer youth participation activities
Represent SOS-Lapsikylä at regional events
what_we_offer: Versatile and responsible position in the expert organization of a children's organization
Flexible hybrid work model
Opportunity to work self-directed and independently with the support of the work community
SOS-Lapsikylä's electronic learning environment Village School supports your familiarization
Comprehensive occupational health care and exercise and well-being benefits
Lunch meals offered
